metadata.notes: Each path is directional. Add reverse path if bidirectional.

paths.notes: EXAMPLE PATH - mentioned in React code as going through MUC courtyard

data_collection_instructions.distance_meters: Measure using Google Maps measuring tool or estimate by walking
data_collection_instructions.estimated_time_seconds: Walking speed = 1.4 m/s (average adult). So time = distance / 1.4
data_collection_instructions.slope_percent: Use Google Earth elevation tool. Rise/Run × 100
data_collection_instructions.stairs_count: Physical count if possible, or estimate from photos
